# CWE-836: Use of Password Hash Instead of Password for Authentication (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-836-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: client submits a password hash that is compared directly to storage.
func Authenticate(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Username     string `json:"username"`
		PasswordHash string `json:"password_hash"`
	}
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var id int
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = $1 AND password_hash = $2", body.Username, body.PasswordHash).Scan(&id)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
